name: Milk Chocolate Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Sweetened Condensed Milk (such as Eagle Brand)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Line a baking dish with parchment paper.
3. In a microwave-safe bowl, melt the milk chocolate chips and butter together until smooth. Stir in the chopped walnuts, vanilla extract, and sweetened condensed milk. Mix well.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared baking dish and spread evenly.
5. Place the dish in the oven and bake for 30-35 minutes or until set around the edges but still slightly firm in the center.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack before cutting into squares.
